reconciliation.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty/Soil only. Expected String of Nickels absent.
reconciliation.P2_Black_Pot: Empty/Soil only. Expected Mexican Mint absent.
reconciliation.P3_Black_Pot: Present. Pothos leaf and Rabbit anchor visible.

new_introductions: Eggshell fragments (calcium amendment) observed in P4 soil surface.

plant_audit.P3: Pothos leaf remains turgid; rabbit anchor stable.
plant_audit.P4: Single petiole/leaf structure showing signs of chlorosis or thinning.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots; no surface cracking.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments present in P4; white paper/material adjacent to pots.

temporal_deltas.t-4_to_t-3: Minor shift in lighting/shadows; plant posture remains static.
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_t-1: Significant drop in ambient light (underexposed image); structural integrity appears maintained.
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: Return to standard lighting; P4 stem appears slightly more recumbent.

visual_health_inference.P4: Stressed/Declining. The single leaf structure lacks vigor.

anomalies: Presence of eggshell fragments suggests an attempt at soil pH or nutrient modification.
P1 and P2 are completely devoid of the registered species.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is currently in a state of severe depletion. While the Pothos (P3) remains a stable anchor, the primary specimens (P1, P2) have suffered total systemic loss. The remaining plant in P4 is struggling, showing signs of structural weakness. The introduction of eggshells indicates an interventionist approach to soil health, though it has not yet yielded visible recovery for the remaining specimens.
